name: QDRO Acquisition Corp.
business: The company is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses or entities. It has not selected any business combination target and has not initiated any substantive discussions with any target. The company intends to focus on a target in the financial services sector, including digital currency and technology industries.

exposures.sentence: Our focus will be on the financial services sector.
We intend to actively look for suitable investment opportunities within the financial services an digital currency and technology sectors.
